zh.lifeSummary: Mary Catherine Cromyn於大約1504年出生在英國德比夏爾斯特費爾德。她於1525年與Sir Thomas Jenkyns Heathcott在英國英格蘭德比夏爾斯特費爾德結婚。他們至少是8個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1570年4月享年67歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Mary Catherine Cromyn于大约1504年出生在英国德比夏爾斯特費爾德。她于1525年与Sir Thomas Jenkyns Heathcott在英国英格兰德比夏爾斯特費爾德结婚。他们至少是8个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1570年4月享年67岁。

nameMeanings.name: Cromyn
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: probably a metathesized form of   Corman  .

variants.name: Corman
meanings: Dutch: occupational name from Middle Dutch cuereman ‘sample master of merchandise’.
Americanized form of German and Jewish (Ashkenazic) Kormann and Kornmann, and perhaps also of Dutch Kornman .

nameMeanings.name: Mary
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From Latin Maria via Old Welsh Meir. See Mary .

nameMeanings.name: Catherine
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Variant spelling of   Katherine .  This form of the name is also used in France.

variants.name: Catheryn
meanings: Variant spelling of   Katherine .  This form of the name is also used in France.

variants.name: Katherine
meanings: Pet form of   Christopher ;  also of   Katherine   and its variants. In the medieval period it was a pet form of   Christian   and   Christiana .

variants.name: Catharin
meanings: Variant spelling of   Katherine .  This form of the name is also used in France.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

en.lifeSummary: Mary Catherine Cromyn was born about 1504, in Chesterfield, Derbyshire, England. She married Sir Thomas Jenkyns Heathcott in 1525, in Chesterfield, Derbyshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 8 sons and 2 daughters. She died in April 1570, at the age of 67.

fr.lifeSummary: Mary Catherine Cromyn est née environ 1504, à Chesterfield, Derbyshire, Angleterre. Elle a épousé Sir Thomas Jenkyns Heathcott en 1525, à Chesterfield, Derbyshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 8 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée en avril 1570, à l’âge de 67 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Mary Catherine Cromyn wurde um 1504 in Chesterfield, Derbyshire, England geboren. Sie hat 1525 in Chesterfield, Derbyshire, England, United Kingdom Sir Thomas Jenkyns Heathcott geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 8 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb im April 1570 im Alter von 67 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Mary Catherine Cromyn è nata il circa 1504 nel Chesterfield, Derbyshire, England. Lei sposato Sir Thomas Jenkyns Heathcott nel 1525, nel Chesterfield, Derbyshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 8 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel aprile 1570, all'età di 67 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Mary Catherine Cromynは約1504年にイギリスデルブイシュアイアチェステルフィールドで生まれた。1525年にイギリスイギリスデルブイシュアイアチェステルフィールドでSir Thomas Jenkyns Heathcottと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも8人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1570年4月に67歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Mary Catherine Cromyn(은)는 대략 1504년 영국 더비실르 체스터필드에서 태어났다. 그녀는 1525년 영국 잉글랜드 더비실르 체스터필드에서 Sir Thomas Jenkyns Heathcott(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여덟 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1570년 4월 67세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Mary Catherine Cromyn nasceu aproximadamente 1504, em Chesterfield, Derbyshire, Inglaterra. Ela casou-se com Sir Thomas Jenkyns Heathcott em 1525, em Chesterfield, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 8 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em abril de 1570, com 67 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Mary Catherine Cromyn родилась около 1504 г. в местности честирфиелд, дирбишир, Англия. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Thomas Jenkyns Heathcott в 1525 г. в местности честирфиелд, дирбишир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 8 сыновей и 2 дочери. Она умерла апрель 1570 г. в возрасте 67 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Mary Catherine Cromyn nació aproximadamente 1504, en Chesterfield, Derbyshire, Inglaterra. Se casó con Sir Thomas Jenkyns Heathcott en 1525, en Chesterfield, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 8 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió en abril de 1570, a la edad de 67 años.
